ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Net Sales, Total Expenditure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., monetary, percentage) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the metric is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal period (e.g., Mar 2018) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal period */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* The fiscal year to which the period belongs */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* The quarter of the fiscal year (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "is_closed" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the fiscal period is closed for data entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the fiscal period */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal period was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the fiscal period */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the fiscal period */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the data is a draft */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the data */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was approved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial report (e.g., Monthly, Annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the report is confidential */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data record accessed (if applicable) */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report accessed (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data or report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data or report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variance_analysis" (
  "variance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variance analysis record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "planned_value" REAL /* Planned value for the financial metric */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value for the financial metric */,
  "variance_amount" REAL /* Variance amount (actual - planned) */,
  "variance_percentage" REAL /* Variance percentage ((actual - planned) / planned) * 100 */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the variance analysis record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variance analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the variance analysis was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variance analysis */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the variance analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variance_analysis_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variance_analysis_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial goal */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the financial metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial goal */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial goal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the financial goal */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial goal was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the financial goal */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_goals_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_goals_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "start_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting fiscal period */,
  "end_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending fiscal period */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Trend value (change in metric value over the period) */,
  "trend_percentage" REAL /* Trend percentage (change in metric value over the period as a percentage) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the trend analysis record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trend analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend analysis was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trend analysis */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_end_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_start_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dashboard */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dashboard */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the dashboard is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
